page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m8.3xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by a 2.7 GHz Intel Xeon processor. It features 12 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, providing a total of 12 vCPUs. The instance is equipped with 96.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It operates on a KVM hypervisor.

This server configuration does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware. Network connectivity is supported by an 8 Gbps baseline bandwidth. There are zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance.

With its 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the instance is classified as memory-optimized. This resource density makes it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads that require significant memory footprints without needing excessive compute scaling or local storage. It is suited for memory-intensive applications, database caching layers, and enterprise applications that rely heavily on RAM.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m8.3xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance running on a KVM hypervisor. Powered by a 2.7 GHz Intel Xeon processor, it provides 12 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, totaling 12 vCPUs. The instance features 96.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage options. Network performance is defined by an 8 Gbps baseline bandwidth, and no complimentary public IPv4 addresses are provided. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads, such as database caching, enterprise applications, and in-memory data processing, where a high RAM-to-vCPU ratio is required without the need for local disk storage.

tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 server featuring twelve dedicated Intel Xeon cores and ninety-six gigabytes of RAM for memory-intensive workloads.
